intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“1929 -> North Pole three years earlier -> R.E. Byrd -> South Pole -> photographs -> serious trouble -> 10,000 feet -> food sacks -> cleared by 400 feet -> endless white plains”的极地飞行链读顺。注意长句要分意群，数字 10,000 feet、400 feet、300 miles 要读清楚，serious trouble 和 crash 要有危险感，最后一句要读出脱险后的平稳。

sentences.text: In 1929, three years after his flight over the North Pole, the American explorer, R.E. Byrd, successfully flew over the South Pole for the first time.
sentences.focus_zh: 长开头按时间和人物分组：In 1929 / three years after his flight over the North Pole / the American explorer, R.E. Byrd。North Pole 和 South Pole 要读清楚，不要混。

sentences.text: Though, at first, Byrd and his men were able to take a great many photographs of the mountains that lay below, they soon ran into serious trouble.
sentences.focus_zh: Though, at first 后面轻停；were able to take photographs 读出一开始顺利；ran into serious trouble 是转折，要读出危险开始。

sentences.text: At one point, it seemed certain that their plane would crash.
sentences.focus_zh: At one point 是故事里的某个危险时刻；seemed certain 表示几乎确定；crash 要读清楚，但不要夸张成喊叫。

sentences.text: It could only get over the mountains if it rose to 10,000 feet.
sentences.focus_zh: could only...if... 是硬条件；get over the mountains 和 rose to 10,000 feet 要分成两组读，数字不要吞。

sentences.text: Byrd at once ordered his men to throw out two heavy food sacks.
sentences.focus_zh: at once 表示立刻；ordered his men to throw out 是命令动作链；two heavy food sacks 要读出 heavy 的重量感。

sentences.text: The plane was then able to rise and it cleared the mountains by 400 feet.
sentences.focus_zh: was then able to rise 是减重后的结果；cleared the mountains 不是清理山，而是越过山；400 feet 要清楚。

sentences.text: Byrd now knew that he would be able to reach the South Pole which was 300 miles away, for there were no more mountains in sight.
sentences.focus_zh: Byrd now knew 后面是他判断安全路径；would be able to reach 要连读；300 miles away 和 no more mountains in sight 是原因链。

sentences.text: The aircraft was able to fly over the endless white plains without difficulty.
sentences.focus_zh: aircraft 是 formal word for plane；endless white plains 要读得开阔一点；without difficulty 是脱险后的平稳结尾。
